canIDeploy.staleWarning: This verdict does not cover the latest detected commit ({commitSha}). Results may be outdated.
canIDeploy.freshnessUnknown: SequrAI could not verify whether this verdict covers your latest code. Push detection has no confirmed signal for this repository — reconnect GitHub or run a new review to be sure.
canIDeploy.reviewFailedWarning: The most recent automatic review for a newer commit failed to complete. This verdict does not reflect that commit.
canIDeploy.reviewInProgress: Continuous Review is currently processing this repository. This verdict reflects the last completed review.
canIDeploy.insufficientData: There is not enough repository coverage yet for a responsible production decision. Run a full review first.
canIDeploy.analysisFailed: The latest review did not complete successfully. Re-run the analysis before trusting this verdict.

safeFix.chooseBlocker: Choose a blocker to generate its Safe Fix Prompt.
safeFix.noBlockers: No production blockers were found. There is nothing to fix right now.
safeFix.projectedEstimateNote: Projected score and verdict are estimates, not a guarantee.
safeFix.copyPrompt: Copy the Safe Fix Prompt below into Cursor or Claude Code.
safeFix.unavailable: A Safe Fix Prompt could not be generated for this blocker.

whatChanged.confirmedIntroducedHeader: Confirmed introduced by your latest change:
whatChanged.noChange: No change since your last valid review.
whatChanged.noPreviousReview: This is the first valid review for this project. There is nothing to compare yet.

productionHistory.noHistory: No valid production reviews yet. Run your first review to start tracking history.

deploymentConfidence.staleNote: This recommendation does not include the latest detected commit.
deploymentConfidence.freshnessUnknown: SequrAI could not verify whether this recommendation covers your latest code. Push detection has no confirmed signal for this repository.
deploymentConfidence.reviewFailedWarning: The most recent automatic review for a newer commit failed to complete, so this recommendation was downgraded to more analysis required.
deploymentConfidence.disclaimer: This recommendation reflects the last completed Production Verdict for this repository.

reasons.ready: No production blockers remain in the latest review.
reasons.blockers: {count} production blocker(s) remain in the latest review.
reasons.insufficientData: There is not enough repository coverage for a responsible recommendation.
reasons.analysisFailed: The latest review did not complete successfully.

errors.unauthorized: Your MCP API key is missing or invalid. Add a valid Authorization header.
errors.invalid_api_key: This MCP API key is invalid or has been revoked. Generate a new key from your SequrAI settings.
errors.project_not_found: This project could not be found in your organization.
errors.ambiguous_project: Your organization has more than one project. Specify a projectId to continue.
errors.repository_disconnected: This project's GitHub repository is not connected. Reconnect it in SequrAI settings.
errors.no_verdict_available: No Production Verdict exists yet for this project. Push a commit or run a review to generate one.
errors.review_in_progress: A Continuous Review is currently running for this project. Try again shortly.
errors.insufficient_data: There is not enough repository coverage yet for a responsible production decision.
errors.analysis_failed: The latest review did not complete successfully.
errors.blocker_not_found: This blocker was not found in the latest Production Verdict. It may already be resolved.
errors.safe_fix_unavailable: A Safe Fix Prompt could not be generated for this blocker.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Wait a moment before trying again.
errors.internal_error: Something went wrong while processing this request. Try again.
